title: Iliad, Book 10: The Night Raid
description: Book 10 of Homer's Iliad: The Night Raid.
introduction: Book 10 of the Iliad: The Night Raid. The Greek text is from the Venetus A manuscript (10th century), the oldest complete manuscript of the Iliad.

translation.original_text: Ἄλλοι μὲν παρὰ νηυσὶν ἀριστῆες Παναχαιῶν εὗδον παννύχιοι μαλακῷ δεδμημένοι ὕπνῳ.
translation.text: The other chieftains slept, overcome by soft sleep. But Agamemnon could not sleep. He and Menelaus roused the camp. Odysseus and Diomedes went out on a night raid, captured the Trojan spy Dolon, and seized the horses of the Thracian king Rhesus.
